creator: henry.hu.sh@gmail.com
text:
Sorry for the late reply.

I plan to add pam configuration files according to the way security/sudo
does. And then add the app.c patch and etc/rc.d/slim patch.
I will wait for another slim PR to be committed, and then create a patch for
this one.
Thank you for helping improving the ports.

-- 
Cheers,
Henry
